subject: Re: Black micrographs for 90% of data set
body:
Hi Jon,

my first guess would be the GPU running out of memory. Could you please 
describe your hardware configuration and processing settings? I can also 
look at one of the problematic movies if you upload it somewhere.

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Thursday, July 26, 2018 at 5:16:33 PM UTC+2, Jonathan Grimes wrote:
>
>
> We are trying to process 2 data sets collected using VPP and Falcon III 
> detectors. 
>
>
> Previous processing with motioncorr2 gave nice results but the processing 
> in warp gave black micrographs in the real Space tab for ~90% of the data 
> set. 
>
>
> Did you already observed this issue?
>
>
> Is there something that we are missing.  i can post the saved settings if 
> this will help
>
>
> thanks
>
> jon grimes
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
